<answer>Before 2015, Burundi hosted visits from: China, Mwai Kibaki, UN Security Council, Media Personnel (Africa), Ministry (Belgium), South African National Defence Force, Jakaya Mrisho Kikwete, Refugee (Tanzania), Agence France-Presse, Eimert van Middelkoop, Charles Mwando Nsimba, Rupiah Banda, James Kabarebe, Hamadoun Touré, East African Community, International Federation of Red Cross and Red Crescent Societies, and Uhuru Muigai Kenyatta.</answer>
